name: Accounts of Eibon, The Unfathomable (Punic & Greek Versions)

description.value:
Later translations of Eibon's work in Punic and Greek. These versions are less complete but still dangerous than the Coptic original. Rumor exists of even older versions in Atlantean and original Hyperborean.

LanguagePunic & Greek
AuthorEibon (translator unknown)
Date750 B.C.
Sanity Loss2D6
Cthulhu Mythos+5/+10 percentiles
Mythos Rating45
Study (weeks)40
